productDisplayName: John Miller Men Gingham Blue Shirt
description: CompositionBlue and white short sleeved gingham shirt, made of a cotton and polyester blend, has a patch pocket on the left chest, a full length buttoned placket and a curved hem FitRegularWash careHand or machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorations                                                                                                Stylish to the hilt, this striped shirt from john miller is a great addition to your wardrobe. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this classy shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with formal trousers and black leather shoes for that absolutely classic look.Model statisticsThe product is of size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulder 18”
